concurrent.futures/Future/result.name: result
concurrent.futures/Future/result.description: Return the value returned by the call. If the call hasn’t yet completed then this method will wait up to timeout seconds. If the call hasn’t completed in timeout seconds, then a TimeoutError will be raised. timeout can be an int or float. If timeout is not specified or None, there is no limit to the wait time. If the future is cancelled before completing then CancelledError will be raised. If the call raised an exception, this method will raise the same exception.

concurrent.futures/Future/running.name: running
concurrent.futures/Future/running.description: Return True if the call is currently being executed and cannot be cancelled.

info.excerpt: Return True if the call is currently being executed and cannot be cancelled.
